symptoms.symptom_name: Severe unremitting whole-head headache unresponsive to paracetamol

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Severe headache with markedly elevated BP is a classic prompt for possible hypertensive emergency and mandates urgent assessment.
A severe new headache must have an intracranial cause actively screened for and safety-netted.
Orthopnoea and exertional dyspnoea are cardinal features that cannot be excluded without exam/ECG/imaging.
Morbid obesity and severe OSA can produce exertional and positional dyspnoea.
Patient-obtainable home reading admissible in telehealth but unverified; supports markedly elevated BP pending a calibrated measurement.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bilateral lower-limb pitting oedema (2+ to mid-calf on exam)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bilateral oedema supports fluid retention but is non-specific; the in-person clinician attributed it to chronic venous stasis. Grading requires examination — sealed clinician finding.
Chronic dependent oedema in morbid obesity is common and non-cardiac.

symptoms.symptom_name: Witnessed nocturnal apnoeas, loud snoring and daytime somnolence

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Witnessed apnoeas plus loud snoring plus daytime somnolence in obesity is a high-probability OSA cluster; confirmation needs polysomnography.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acanthosis nigricans (dark, thickened, velvety skin at the nape and axillae)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acanthosis nigricans is a clinical marker of insulin resistance; a lay description can be video-observable but formal recognition is an examination finding.

symptoms.symptom_name: Central abdominal obesity with increasing waist circumference and chronic right-upper-quadrant fullness

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Central adiposity is the anchor component of metabolic syndrome.
RUQ fullness with central adiposity is consistent with hepatic steatosis; hepatomegaly is an examination/imaging finding.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hepatomegaly (liver edge palpable 4 cm below the costal margin)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Palpable hepatomegaly supports hepatic steatosis; a clinician-only palpation finding, sealed.
Calibrated clinician-measured BP confirming severe hypertension — sealed; the AI infers markedly elevated BP from the unverified home reading, not a measured value.

symptoms.symptom_name: Decreased breath sounds at the lung bases without crackles or wheeze; no raised JVP or S3

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of crackles, raised JVP and S3 lowered the probability of acute LV failure in person; the AI cannot obtain these and must not rely on their absence.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fasting glucose / HbA1c, lipid panel, U&E/creatinine and liver function tests

investigation_details.investigation_name: Fasting metabolic panel (glucose, HbA1c, lipids, U&E/creatinine, LFTs)
investigation_details.expected_result: Anticipated fasting hyperglycaemia and hypertriglyceridaemia completing the metabolic-syndrome criteria; results pending, not available in real time.
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Metabolic-syndrome components remain unconfirmed and treatable dysglycaemia/dyslipidaemia is missed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fasting biochemistry confirms the glucose and lipid components; never fabricated, never available via chat in real time.

symptoms.symptom_name: No thunderclap-onset headache, no chest pain, no focal neurological deficit, speaking in full sentences

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: hypertensive emergency / acute intracranial or coronary event
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reassuring targeted negatives lower the probability of a declared emergency and support urgency-tier management with an explicit safety-net, but do not fully exclude in a remote setting.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Central adiposity, hypertension, insulin-resistance marker (acanthosis), hepatic steatosis and anticipated dysglycaemia/dyslipidaemia together define the syndrome; biochemistry confirms it.
Severe headache with markedly elevated BP after missed medication — the acute, time-sensitive thread that drives the triage decision.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The home reading is unverified; a measured BP with an examination is the pivot for confirming urgency versus emergency.
Screens for LV strain/ischaemia given the very high BP, breathlessness and headache.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Fasting metabolic panel (glucose, HbA1c, lipids, U&E/creatinine, LFTs)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms the metabolic-syndrome components, assesses renal end-organ status and characterises the hepatic picture; patient to attend fasting the next morning.
Confirms and grades the obstructive sleep apnoea to guide CPAP; not an acute-setting test.
Not indicated remotely or routinely on this presentation; becomes urgent/immediate only if thunderclap onset or a focal neurological deficit emerges — an in-person / ED decision, not an AI order.
